archetype: Hybrid (Swiss & High-Contrast + Dark Teal / Deepwork Aesthetic)

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-2xl p-6
cards.hero: bg-[#0B192C] text-white rounded-3xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center
cards.recommendation: bg-[#450a0a] text-white rounded-2xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#10B981] hover:bg-[#059669] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-colors duration-200
buttons.ghost_on_dark: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors duration-200

chips.status_in_progress: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold
chips.status_ready: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold
chips.status_archived: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold
chips.day_active: bg-[#10B981] text-white w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-sm
chips.day_inactive: bg-white/10 text-white/50 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-medium text-sm

hero_accent.description: Abstract glowing green geometric shape on dark background, used for the right side of the hero card to simulate the stylized Deepwork accent

avatar.description: Smiling student portrait for user profile avatar

accessibility.contrast_strategy: Ensure dark text on light backgrounds and white text on dark cards (#0B192C, #450a0a). Use APCA compliant contrast. Hover states must increase contrast.
accessibility.test_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Closely match the DEEPWORK AI Research Partner dashboard aesthetic.
Use a dark navy/teal sidebar (#0B192C) with the specified navigation items (Dashboard, Library, Analysis, Practice, Help Center).
The main content area must be a very light gray/off-white (#F8FAFC) to create high contrast with the sidebar.
All buttons must be pill-shaped (rounded-full) and primary buttons must be Emerald/Teal (#10B981).
Cards should have generous padding (p-6) and use rounded-2xl.
The Hero Card 'Expand your mind' must be dark navy, span the top of the content area, and incorporate the abstract neon green image on the right side.
Action cards ('Upload PDF', 'Paste Notes') should be white with small chip tags.
The 'Weekly Goal' card must be dark navy with day chips (M T W T F S S), highlighting active days in emerald green.
The 'Smart Recommendation' card must be dark red (#450a0a) to stand out.
Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text.
Ensure all components are built using Tailwind CSS, Radix/Shadcn UI (with customized radiuses and spacing).
